News

February 2026: We would like to wellcome our new PhD student Lina-Liv Willruth. She begins her PhD research on the prevention of plant diseases project.

October 2025: We would like to wellcome our new PhD student Leonie Hahn. She begins her PhD research on the smartReForest project for climate-resilient reforestation strategies.

Stay updated with our latest research breakthroughs, grants awarded, publications, and group achievements.
